description: You are a Regulatory Affairs Manager preparing a CTD Module 2.5 Clinical Overview for FDA submission for the drug Sorvimab (NDA 215847) by Meridian Biotherapeutics. Restructure the document located at /home/ga/Documents/clinical_overview_draft.docx into three sections with independent headers and footers. Section 1 (Title Page, ending at 'January 2025') must have no header or page numbers. Section 2 (Front Matter, starting at 'Table of Contents') must include the header 'Sorvimab — NDA 215847 — Clinical Overview' and centered lowercase Roman numeral page numbers starting at i. Section 3 (Body and References, starting at '2.5.1 Product Development Rationale') must include the header 'Sorvimab — NDA 215847 — Clinical Overview' and centered Arabic numeral page numbers starting at 1. Save the formatted document as /home/ga/Documents/clinical_overview_formatted.docx.
